title: heliocereus elegantissimus subsp. helenae
intro: Heliocereus elegantissimus subsp. helenae, also known as the Helen's pitaya or the night-blooming cereus, is a species of cactus that is native to the island of Hawaii. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Heliocereus elegantissimus subsp. helenae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Heliocereus elegantissimus subsp. helenae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
